description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed constructed from horizontal wooden planks. The cart features two large spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side near the rear, providing stability and mobility. At the front, two long, straight wooden handles extend outward, allowing a person to push or pull the cart. The sides and back of the cart are enclosed with wooden panels, while the front is open for easy loading and unloading. The wood shows a natural grain with some weathering, giving it an aged, utilitarian appearance. The interior is spacious and flat, suitable for transporting goods or materials in an urban or park setting.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, enclosed sides, and long front handles for pushing or pulling. The cart has a flat, plank-style cargo bed and a rustic, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart with both handles extending forward and the enclosed sides and back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one large spoked wheel, the full length of the handles, and the plank construction of the cart's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back panel, the flat cargo bed, and the symmetry of the side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other wheel visible, showing the same handle and plank details as the first side.
